Outline Atlas — AEQD

Clean 16×9, A4 landscape/portrait azimuthal equidistant maps centered on any city.

This tool will generate an Azimuthal Equidistant Projection for any place you enter. All lines passing through the central point reflect true distance.

Keyboard: +/– to zoom, ← and → to rotate.

Zoom and pan the map to fit the frame in the most interesting and useful way. The default frame is 16x9 to make easy presentation slides, but you can also select two orientations of an A4 sheet of paper. Try rotating the map to fit your subject—north should not always be "up."

Choose one of the color themes or set your own colors. Three levels of detail are available (higher is slower)

Export your map to a JPG and paste it wherever you like.

Ready.
